# Contract: Auth API Routes

Auth.js v5 registers its own handlers at `/api/auth/[...nextauth]`. These are not application-defined routes — they are generated by Auth.js. Documented here for middleware and integration test reference.

## Routes (Auto-Generated by Auth.js)

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `GET` | `/api/auth/signin` | Initiates sign-in (renders provider list or redirects) |
| `GET` | `/api/auth/signin/github` | Initiates GitHub OAuth redirect |
| `GET` | `/api/auth/callback/github` | OAuth callback — receives code from GitHub, validates, creates session |
| `GET` | `/api/auth/signout` | Initiates sign-out |
| `POST` | `/api/auth/signout` | Completes sign-out, clears session cookie |
| `GET` | `/api/auth/session` | Returns current session as JSON (used by client-side `useSession`) |
| `GET` | `/api/auth/csrf` | Returns CSRF token |

## Middleware Exclusion

The middleware matcher excludes `/api/auth/*` to prevent redirect loops:
```typescript
matcher: ["/((?!api/auth|_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico).*)"]
```

## Session Cookie

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Name | `authjs.session-token` |
| Type | HTTP-only, Secure (prod), SameSite=Lax |
| Format | Signed JWT (`@auth/core/jwt` encode, secret = `AUTH_SECRET`) |
| Expiry | Auth.js default (30 days from last activity) |

## OAuth Callback URL

Must be registered in the GitHub OAuth App settings:
- **Development**: `http://localhost:3000/api/auth/callback/github`
- **Production**: `https://<app-domain>/api/auth/callback/github`
